hero.name: Igor Moura
hero.description: I am a full-stack developer who is constantly evolving, with a focus on Node.js, React, and TypeScript. I aim to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions on challenging projects.

metadata.title: Portfolio | Igor Moura - Full-Stack Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Igor Moura, a Full-Stack developer specialized in Node.js, React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Explore my projects, skills, and professional journey.
metadata.ogDescription: Explore Igor Moura's projects and career.

projects.title: Weekster Hub — Last.fm Visual Hub
projects.description: Full platform to visualize Last.fm scrobbles: dashboard with weekly digest, exportable album collage, 9:16 Story capsules, period-based wrapped, user comparison, global charts, and tag exploration — with an app shell, server-side APIs, and HD PNG export.

projects.title: PetExpress - Pet Shop Management System
projects.description: PetExpress is a complete pet shop system focused on scalability and usability. It enables you to manage pets, products, appointments, and payments. The project reinforced my mastery of RESTful APIs, profile-based authentication, and software architecture.

projects.title: Marvel Comics Website
projects.description: An application to explore the Marvel universe, with a focus on modularity and component reuse. The main challenge was authenticating with the Marvel API and dynamic pagination, strengthening my experience working with complex APIs.

projects.title: Scaffold CLI
projects.description: A CLI that automates API creation with support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. The challenge was building a flexible generator, deepening my knowledge of automating project setup and integrating with multiple databases.

experiences.description: Full-stack development on the PetroFull fuel industry platform. Building features with React, TypeScript, and NestJS, including AI integrations and the Meta WhatsApp Business API, plus REST APIs backed by PostgreSQL.
Developed desktop solutions with Pascal and Lazarus and worked with SQL Server databases.

Developed and maintained responsive web interfaces with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. On the backend, built scalable APIs with Node.js and NestJS, integrating databases such as PostgreSQL and Firebase. Used Docker for development environments and Vercel for deployments.
